title: Play!
excerpt: Still loving what we're seeing on Instagram using #amytangerine. Thanks for sharing your talents over social media - it's really great to see how you all play with our products. From left to right, top to bottom: 1. @polkadotcreative |…
body:
Still loving what we're seeing on Instagram using #amytangerine. Thanks for sharing your talents over social media - it's really great to see how you all play with our products.

It's the last day of CHA. What a wonderful show, which I will have plenty of photos for a recap later on. But for now, here's the booth, where work felt more like play for 4 days.Instead of heading home tonight, I will be making a little appearance at the Big Picture Classes Play! event. You can still join in on all the fun from home. Play on!

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
